title: Reighn of Nether:survival mode addon
description:
This mod is an addon for the "Reign of Nether RTS" mod. The mod allows you to switch to RTS mode in survival mode.
Notes:
The KeepInventory gamerule should be on or you will lost all your items!

Mod was made with MCreator
body:
This mod is an addon for the _"[Reighn of Nether RTS](https://modrinth.com/mod/reign-of-nether-rts)"_ mod. The mod allows you to switch to RTS mode in survival mode.
Notes:
- The KeepInventory gamerule should be on or you will lost all your items!
  


Mod was made with _MCreator_
